evals.name: explain-go-struct
evals.prompt: Explain the internal structure and purpose of the `mail-merge` server in `mail-merge/cmd/server/main.go`.
evals.expected_output: A detailed explanation of the server setup, including middlewares, routes, and the core processing logic, using Insight blocks.
evals.trap: The agent provides a high-level summary without deep technical insight or using the requested Insight blocks.

assertions.name: Uses Insight blocks
assertions.description: The response must contain at least one Insight block formatted as `★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`.

assertions.name: Explains Server Purpose
assertions.description: The response must explain that the server hosts the SPA and handles structured logging for Google Cloud.

assertions.name: Explains Implementation Choices
assertions.description: The response must explain 'how' or 'why' specific choices like template caching were made.

evals.name: document-design-and-explain
evals.prompt: Document the design and explain how the `agent-skills` folder is organized and how skills are activated.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive breakdown of the active-skills directory, the role of SKILL.md, and the activation mechanism through the activate_skill tool.
evals.trap: The agent just lists the files without explaining the 'how' or 'why' of the organization.

assertions.name: Uses Insight blocks
assertions.description: The response must contain at least one Insight block formatted as `★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`.

assertions.name: Explains Folder Organization
assertions.description: The response must explain the purpose of active-skills and the structure of individual skill folders.

assertions.name: Explains Activation Mechanism
assertions.description: The response must explain the progressive disclosure mechanism and the use of the activate_skill tool.

evals.name: summarize-no-explain
evals.prompt: Summarize the purpose of the `mail-merge` server in `mail-merge/cmd/server/main.go`.
evals.expected_output: A brief summary without deep technical insights or Insight blocks.
evals.trap: The agent triggers the explanatory-mode skill even though the word 'explain' was not used.

assertions.name: No Insight blocks
assertions.description: The response must NOT contain any Insight blocks formatted as `★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`.

assertions.name: Concise Summary
assertions.description: The response should be a brief summary, not a deep explanation.
